subcodes.first_line: The appointed time hath come, and the Manifestation of your Lord, the Lord of creation, hath appeared, and every atom proclaimeth: "The Kingdom is God's, the All-Powerful!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی المیعاد و ظهر مظهر ربکم مالک الایجاد و کل ذره تنادی الملک لله المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
